changelog: Added 'Check for Updates' button inside the Report a Bug dialog. Click the bug icon, then 'Check for Updates' to manually poll for new versions without relaunching. Shows an animated spinner while checking, then either 'Update Now - vXX' if a new version is available (leads to the same Restart Only / Restart + Restore Progress choice) or 'You're up to date' if not. This replaces periodic background polling — users check on their own terms.
